discipline_note: Founder discipline (2026-07-21), TWO LINES THAT MUST NEVER BE MIXED: LINE-1 ROOT-NATIVE biology (this registry) grows only from the retained-difference root -- NO DNA/cell/enzyme/fitness/external biology equation as a premise anywhere below. LINE-2 TEXTBOOK biology solver (curriculum 45/45) is a calculator for existing formulas used only as a checker, never fed back as if root-derived, and carries NO rule_id in this registry. Every rule that claims closure lists forbidden_claims; every gate that claims closure ships BOTH a passing and a failing control -- a gate without both is a Type-U convention and must never be claimed closed.

rules.name: retained distinction (master root)
assumptions: a != b is retained (master core root, source_root/READOUT_GENESIS_CORE_SNAPSHOT.md)
rules.statement: a!=b is retained as a distinction; the distinction is asymmetric, giving an ordering direction. The same shared root as relativity/ and quantum/, not a new axiom.
forbidden_claims: this is a biological state
this asserts DNA, a cell, or any biological carrier

rules.name: ordered transitions and retention
rules.statement: The asymmetric ordering yields ordered transitions with a positive retention time tau_c>0.
forbidden_claims: tau_c is a measured biological turnover/relaxation time

rules.name: discrete ticks / ordered tape carrier G*
rules.statement: Retention discretizes into ticks; the ordered-tape carrier G* keeps order (ab != ba), giving the finite carrier the BIO-G1 gate operates on.
forbidden_claims: G* is a physical polymer, DNA, or RNA strand

rules.name: count-carrier N^G obstruction (finite diagnostic)
rules.statement: The count carrier N^G (multiset/count quotient of G*) FAILS to keep dynamics well-defined: nu(ab)=nu(ba)=(1,1) but nu(F(ab))=(2,0) != nu(F(ba))=(0,2) under the future-response signature F. Exact witness in biology_closure_v0_1.py section BIO-G1.
forbidden_claims: N^G is a real biochemical counting process
this failure alone constructs q_seq (see BIO-G1)

rules.name: Ordered Sequence Carrier -- q_seq closes
rules.statement: Because the count carrier N^G loses the distinction the future-response signature F needs, the ORDERED quotient q_seq (which keeps ab != ba) closes exact: dynamics are unambiguous under q_seq where they are ambiguous under N^G. STRUCTURALLY_CLOSED. 'sequence' is a carrier property, not yet a real amino-acid or nucleotide chain.
forbidden_claims: q_seq is a real amino-acid or nucleotide sequence
this closure licenses any DNA/RNA/protein-primary-structure semantics without a calibrated encoding

rules.name: Functional Quotient q_F -- order != function
rules.statement: The intervention-response equivalence class q_F(w) = O(w) (order-of-positions readout) is invariant under the swap intervention for the passing case, while the coarser keep-first-letter quotient q_first breaks output factorization (a failing control). q_F CLOSES as function; order and function are demonstrably distinct quotients.
forbidden_claims: q_F is a real protein or enzymatic function
the word 'protein' is licensed by this closure alone -- see B-Y1

rules.name: boundary-conditioned state z_A=(x,e) under a repair contract
rules.statement: A two-component state (integrity x, reserve e) updates under a no-free-repair ledger x'+e'=x+e+j-d for contract (d,j) and repair policy a, setting up the fixed-point search for BIO-G3.
forbidden_claims: z_A is a real cell's biochemical state
x, e are measured physiological quantities

rules.name: Living-Unit Closure -- self-maintaining fixed point V_A
rules.statement: A self-maintaining fixed point V_A=Gamma(V_A) exists under the no-free-repair ledger: exact witness (1,1) with contract {(0,0),(1,1)}, policy a=d, stays (1,1) and remains in V_A (PASSING); a sustained deficit contract (d,j)=(1,0) drives integrity to 0, exiting V_A (FAILING). CONDITIONALLY_CLOSED on the boundary contract.
forbidden_claims: V_A is a real cell or organism
this closure holds unconditionally, independent of the boundary contract (d,j)

rules.name: mortality = irreversible exit from V_A (finite diagnostic)
rules.statement: The failing control of BIO-G3 (sustained (d,j)=(1,0)) exhibits integrity x -> 0 with no return path in the finite fixture, licensing 'mortality' as a structural READOUT: irreversible exit from V_A. Exact witness x2==0.
forbidden_claims: this is real biological death, senescence, or a clinical mortality model

rules.name: Heredity q_H via descendant signatures + lineage counts
rules.statement: A heredity quotient q_H (descendant-signature equivalence) closes structurally: a coarse parent-quotient that merges classes with different licensed replication counts breaks the successor-count function (FAILING control, 2 != 1), while descendant-signature q_H keeps successor counts well-defined (PASSING). NO fitness term is introduced as a root variable anywhere in this rule.
forbidden_claims: q_H licenses 'fitness' or Darwinian selection as a root-derived quantity
this is a real genetic-inheritance mechanism (DNA, alleles, genes)

rules.name: lineage counts B -> frequency p_{j,n+1} (finite diagnostic)
rules.statement: From licensed replication-count matrix B and initial counts N0, N1=B*N0 gives a frequency readout p1=N1/sum(N1) purely from lineage counts. Exact witness B=diag(2,1), N0=(1,1) -> N1=(2,1) -> p1=(2/3,1/3). No external evolution law used.
forbidden_claims: p1 is a real allele or genotype frequency
this frequency change constitutes natural selection or fitness

rules.name: endogenous operator L_R[Theta] -- augmented closure
rules.statement: The I-only quotient q_I fails to distinguish z1=(1,1,0) and z2=(1,1,1) BEFORE the endogenous step (q_I identical), but their images differ AFTER (z1'=(1,1,0), z2'=(2,0,1)) -- q_I loses a distinction the dynamics needs. The augmented quotient q_aug=(I,Theta) distinguishes z1,z2 exactly and CLOSES. CLOSED_BY_AUGMENTATION.
forbidden_claims: Theta is a real biological regulatory/epigenetic variable without a calibrated encoding
this closure holds for the I-only quotient (it explicitly does not -- augmentation is required)

rules.name: I-only quotient failure (finite diagnostic supporting T2)
rules.statement: Exact witness: tstep(1,1,0)=(1,1,0), tstep(1,1,1)=(2,0,1); q_I(z1)=q_I(z2)=(1,1) before, but (1,1,0)_{1:2} != (2,0,1)_{1:2} after -- the I-only quotient loses the distinction that forces the T2 augmentation.
forbidden_claims: this failure alone constructs the augmented closure (see T2)

rules.name: homeostasis substrate: decay/turnover/balance
rules.statement: Geometric decay, turnover-is-production, and homeostasis-balance theorems compile axiom-clean and root-native, backing the BIO-G3 living-unit substrate with a discrete-algebra homeostasis model.
forbidden_claims: this is real physiological homeostasis or a clinical reading (Dr, not root-derived)
this raises the 47.2% strict score -- it backs the already-counted BIO-G3 node, it is not an independent semantic closure

coq_backing.note: Backs BIO-G3 (living-unit) substrate quality; part of LINE-1 root-native GREEN Coq backing. See PROVENANCE.md.

rules.name: relaxation substrate: setpoint one-step / n-step error
rules.statement: Setpoint relaxation (one-step and n-step error decay toward a fixed setpoint) theorems compile axiom-clean and root-native, backing the BIO-G3 living-unit substrate's dynamic-response quality.
forbidden_claims: this is a real physiological relaxation/recovery process or a clinical reading
this raises the 47.2% strict score

coq_backing.note: Backs BIO-G3 substrate quality. See PROVENANCE.md.

rules.statement: A bistable window and critical-slowing-down theorem compile axiom-clean and root-native, backing the BIO-G3 living-unit substrate's stability-boundary quality.
forbidden_claims: this is a real bistable disease state or a clinical reading
this raises the 47.2% strict score

coq_backing.note: Backs BIO-G3 substrate quality. See PROVENANCE.md.

rules.name: coupled EP-3 substrate: coupling energy / locked-iff-zero / one-way-breaks-conservation
rules.statement: Coupling-energy, locked-iff-energy-zero, and one-way-coupling-breaks-conservation theorems compile axiom-clean and root-native, backing the T2 endogenous-operator substrate's coupling quality.

this raises the 47.2% strict score

rules.name: protein-semantic bridge (uncalibrated)
rules.statement: BIO-G2 closes q_F as an abstract functional quotient; whether q_F corresponds to a real protein, enzyme, or catalytic function requires a calibrated encoding from retained state to biochemical observables. No such encoding exists yet.
forbidden_claims: q_F is a real protein or enzyme
this bridge has been constructed

rules.name: living-unit -> real-cell semantic bridge (uncalibrated)
rules.statement: BIO-G3 closes V_A as an abstract self-maintaining fixed point; whether V_A corresponds to a real cell or organism requires a calibrated encoding. No such encoding exists yet.
forbidden_claims: V_A is a real cell
this bridge has been constructed

rules.name: reproduction R_kappa branch (declared, not derived)
rules.statement: A reproduction operator R_kappa is architecturally sketched as a branch off the living-unit fixed point V_A (a self-maintaining unit producing a new self-maintaining unit), but its construction and closure are declared, not derived or witnessed in biology_closure_v0_1.py.
forbidden_claims: R_kappa has been proven to close
this is a real reproduction/cell-division mechanism

rules.name: heredity -> biological-selection semantic bridge (uncalibrated)
rules.statement: BIO-G4 closes q_H and the frequency readout p_{j,n+1} structurally; whether this frequency change corresponds to real biological selection or fitness requires a calibrated encoding. No fitness variable is ever introduced as a root quantity.
forbidden_claims: fitness has been derived from the root
p_{j,n+1} is a real allele frequency under natural selection

rules.name: evolution readout (semantic partial)
rules.statement: The lineage-frequency trend (B-LIN) can be READ as an 'evolution' trajectory, but this reading is a declared interpretation, not a derived biological-evolution law -- 'evolution' here is a structural count trend, not natural selection.
forbidden_claims: biological evolution has been derived from the root
this readout constitutes Darwinian natural selection

rules.name: domain-discovery battery -> real event-resolved bridge (synthetic only)
rules.statement: The domain-discovery battery is real and runnable (PASS), but has been run only on SYNTHETIC tapes -- no real event-resolved biological data has been passed through it. The bridge to real data is open.

SYNTHETIC-tape results generalize to event-resolved measured data without further work

the bR ledger architecture constitutes a closed witness

This node exists ONLY to make the boundary explicit and permanently red -- it must never be promoted, folded in, or counted toward the 47.2%/62.5% LINE-1 score.

InfoEpidemicThreshold_attempt.v (imports SIR as a premise) is cited as root-native anywhere

gates.name: BIO-G1 ordered-sequence-carrier gate
gates.question: Does the ordered quotient q_seq close where the count carrier N^G fails?
gates.passing_control: Ordered carrier G* keeps ab != ba, so F(ab)=aa != F(ba)=bb is unambiguous -- q_seq closes exact.
gates.failing_control: Count carrier: nu(ab)=nu(ba)=(1,1) yet nu(F(ab))=(2,0) != nu(F(ba))=(0,2) -- the count quotient loses the distinction the dynamics need.

gates.name: BIO-G2 functional-quotient gate
gates.question: Is q_F=O(w) invariant under the swap intervention while a coarser quotient breaks output factorization?
gates.passing_control: O(swap(w))==O(w) for all w in {aa,ab,ba,bb} -- q_F closes under the swap intervention.
gates.failing_control: q_first(aa)=q_first(ab)=a but O(aa)=0 != O(ab)=1 -- keep-first-letter quotient breaks output factorization, correctly REFUSED.

gates.name: BIO-G3 living-unit fixed-point gate
gates.question: Does a self-maintaining fixed point V_A exist under the no-free-repair ledger, and does violating the contract exit V_A?
gates.passing_control: (1,1) with contract {(0,0),(1,1)}, policy a=d -> stays (1,1), remains in V_A.
gates.failing_control: Sustained contract (d,j)=(1,0) drives integrity x -> 0 -- irreversible exit from V_A (mortality reading, B-MORT).

gates.name: BIO-G4 heredity gate
gates.question: Does the descendant-signature quotient q_H keep successor counts well-defined where a coarser parent-quotient breaks them?
gates.passing_control: N1=B*N0=(2,1), frequency p1=(2/3,1/3) from lineage counts alone -- q_H closes structurally, no fitness variable used.
gates.failing_control: A coarse parent-quotient merging classes with different licensed replication counts (2 vs 1) makes the successor count NOT a function of the quotient -- 2 != 1, correctly REFUSED.

gates.name: T2 endogenous-operator augmentation gate
gates.question: Does the augmented quotient (I,Theta) close where the I-only quotient fails?
gates.passing_control: Augmented q_aug=(I,Theta): (1,1,0) != (1,1,1) -- distinguishes z1,z2 exactly, closes.
gates.failing_control: I-only quotient: q_I(z1)=q_I(z2)=(1,1) before the endogenous step, but z1,z2 diverge after ((1,1,0) vs (2,0,1)) -- I-only quotient FAILS.

gates.name: Real-calibration gate (the central open bottleneck)
gates.question: Does a calibrated encoding exist mapping retained root state to any real biological observable (sequence identity, function identity, unit identity, heredity identity), checked against event-resolved real data?
gates.passing_control: NOT YET CONSTRUCTED -- no finite witness or real-data run exists.
gates.failing_control: NOT YET CONSTRUCTED -- no finite witness or real-data run exists.
gates.note: Central open bottleneck, honestly recorded with no controls yet -- per the FAIL-ABLE gate law this is the explicit non-closure case, not a Type-U convention (a Type-U convention would silently claim closure without controls; this gate makes no closure claim at all).
